trycatch.timeout_catch_order: OperationCanceledException when timeoutSource.IsCancellationRequested MUST precede plain OperationCanceledException
trycatch.timeout_exception_treatment: dependency failure — wrap in localized DependencyException or FailedServiceDependencyException
trycatch.required_catch_when_token_present: catch (OperationCanceledException) { throw; } MUST exist when CancellationToken parameter is present

propagation.flow: Controller → Coordination → Orchestration → Foundation → Broker → Dependency
propagation.never_drop: token MUST be passed to all dependency calls
